metadata.description: Blockchain skills for Claude Code — blockchain RPC infrastructure, smart contracts, and decentralized applications powered by NodeReal MegaNode

plugins.name: nodereal-skills
plugins.description: MegaNode skills for blockchain developers and founders: NodeReal RPC infrastructure (25+ chains), Enhanced APIs (ERC-20/NFT data), MegaFuel gasless transactions, Direct Route MEV protection, Debug/Trace APIs, smart contract verification, WebSocket subscriptions, API Marketplace (NFTScan, Contracts, Greenfield), non-EVM chains (Aptos, NEAR, Avalanche), and multi-chain dApp development
